response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified 'Fall in Grace' title screen, followed by narrative, then a song performance.
2. OCR on screen at 02:59 identified 'あなぐらぐらし' (Anagura Gurashi) and 'きくお' (Kikuo).
3. Used search string: '"Anagura Gurashi" Kikuo Japanese and English lyrics'.
4. Found bilingual lyrics on several sites including Lyrical Nonsense and Genius.
5. Mapped scenes to timestamps and populated metadata accordingly.
response.global_summary: The video starts with a title screen and a narrative introduction, followed by a vocal performance of the song 'Anagura Gurashi' by the character Ouro Kronii.

scenes.description: Intro screen showing the title 'Fall in Grace, Ouro Kronii Birthday Live 2020'.
Narrative sequence explaining the backstory with on-screen text.
Ouro Kronii performs the song 'Anagura Gurashi'. The song title and composer are displayed on-screen.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Inside a cramped, narrow hole
The two of us show each other our dreams
We can't be in that world; 
Neither can we be in this world
Dear God, child god
We are in your sandbox, covered in scratches
Ta-ta-ta...
We're dancing, we're spinning
Our dance is a strange dance
Intending to dance, intending to laugh
Intending to collapse, intending to shout
Eyes are dizzy, sounds are mushy
Feet are dizzy, protective charms are mushy
The sun and the moon, the sky and the gods, all born
We can't get out, can't get out
Can't get out, so we don't get out
Close your eyes, 2, 1, 0...
Falling, falling, falling away
Inside the vortex of 'Hole-Dwelling'
Falling, falling, falling away
Together, getting along, everywhere
Same, same, isn't it the same?
You and I, forever
Same, same, isn't it the same?
It's forbidden, it's forbidden, it's lonely, it's lonely, it's forbidden, it's lonely, it's lonely
